workDir.label: Work directory (session backups, etc.)
workDir.notWritable: This directory is not writable: {{error}}. Please choose another work directory.

parallelSessions.label: Max parallel chat sessions
parallelSessions.hint: Multiple sessions can send AI requests at the same time (including tool loops). When the limit is reached, you'll be asked to try again later.

discardChanges.title: Discard unsaved changes?
discardChanges.content: Changes you made in Settings have not been saved.

models.noModelsAvailable: No models available. Add or enable a model first.

add.namePlaceholder: Enter the model ID from your provider
add.hint: Helps the agent manage the context window. Leave empty if unsure.
add.fastLabel: Mark as fast model (for low-cost simple tasks)

apiServices.title: API services
apiServices.intro: Each service has its own API key and base URL. The service marked as active is used for all chat requests.

defaults.title: Model settings
defaults.intro: Choose the default model for chat. When Thinking is enabled, supported models show their reasoning process.
defaults.thinkingHint: Only applies to models that support extended thinking

llmService.maxServices: You can configure up to {{max}} LLM services
llmService.deleteContent: Delete this service? This cannot be undone.
llmService.apiKeyLabel: API Key (leave empty to keep current)
llmService.apiKeyHintConfigured: Key configured · entering a new value will overwrite it
llmService.baseUrlLabel: Base URL (optional; leave empty for Anthropic official)

skills.autoDetect: Let AI choose Skills to load based on their descriptions
skills.alwaysLoadPlaceholder: Select Skills to load in every session
skills.deleteContent: This permanently deletes the user-level Skill directory. This cannot be undone.

tools.listIntro: When a tool is disabled, the agent cannot call it in chat. Related tasks may fail or fall back to other capabilities.

switches.label: Tool toggles
switches.hint: Control which capabilities the agent can use in chat

shell.boundaryDescription: Shell starts in the session work directory. The system scans command paths and warns on out-of-bounds or sensitive access; high-risk injection patterns are rejected outright. Shell cannot constrain all child-process behavior like file tools can. Do not confirm untrusted commands.
shell.outputHint: Feishu remote sessions always use plain text. Run interactive full-screen commands (less, vim, top, etc.) in an external terminal.
shell.sensitivePrefixesHelpIntro: List folder paths that need extra care. When AI uses Shell to touch these directories, you'll get a prominent warning and must confirm before execution.
shell.sensitivePrefixesHelpExample1: Team secrets, certificates, or production config directories
shell.sensitivePrefixesHelpExample2: Local database backups or internal credential folders
shell.sensitivePrefixesHelpExample3: Any directory you don't want AI to touch silently
shell.sensitivePrefixesHelpOutro: Leave empty if none apply. The system also protects common sensitive locations such as .ssh and .env.
shell.sensitivePrefixesPlaceholder: One path per line, e.g. D:\secrets
shell.executablePlaceholder: Leave empty for platform default (Windows: cmd, Unix: bash)
shell.emptyRules: No custom rules; everything requires confirmation by default

browser.allowRemoteHint: When enabled, Feishu Bot remote commands can use the browser to access the web. Off by default to reduce remote abuse risk.
browser.depsNotReadyDescription: Click the button below to fix this in chat.
browser.stagehandModelLabel: Model used by the action engine
browser.stagehandModelPlaceholder: Leave empty to reuse the current LLM model (auto-converted to provider/model name)
browser.trustedDomainsHint: No confirmation inside the list; others ask once per chat session.
browser.allowHttpHint: When off, only https links are allowed.
browser.headlessHint: On runs in the background without a window; off shows browser actions.
browser.idleTimeoutLabel: Close idle browser component to free memory (seconds)

feishu.notifyOnReceive: Send system notification when a command is received
feishu.sessionMergeLabel: Session merge (minutes; 0 = new session per message)
feishu.remoteAllowLocalWrite: Allow remote commands to write local files
feishu.integrationHint: If Feishu MCP tools are configured, avoid enabling conflicting capabilities in the Tools tab.
feishu.ipcMissingBuild: This app build does not include Feishu IPC. Start from the feature/feishu-integration branch and rebuild the main process.
feishu.ipcMissingRebuild: This app build does not include Feishu IPC. Rebuild the main process.
feishu.installTimeout: Install timed out. Check your network or run npm install -g @larksuite/cli manually.
feishu.configuringApp: Initializing Feishu app; waiting for setup link (about 10–30 seconds)…
feishu.configBrowserOpened: Setup page opened in browser. Complete sign-in and wait…
feishu.configTimeout: Configuration timed out. If setup finished in the browser, click Re-check or turn on App configured manually.
feishu.configManualUrl: If the browser did not open, visit the setup link manually (see CLI output).
feishu.loginTimeout: Sign-in timed out. Complete authorization in the browser and try again.
feishu.loginBrowserOpened: Sign-in page opened in browser. Complete authorization.

wiki.rootPathLabel: Wiki root path (relative to work directory)
wiki.hideFromTreeLabel: Hide Wiki directory from file tree
wiki.interactiveIngestLabel: Confirm ingest highlights with user before ingest
